sentences.arabic: الغِذَاءُ الصِّحِّيُّ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِجِسْمِ الإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Zdrava hrana je veoma važna za ljudsko tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Healthy food is very important for the human body.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْكُلَ الخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالفَوَاكِهَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Moramo jesti povrće i voće svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: We must eat vegetables and fruits every day.

sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الكَثِيرِ مِنَ المَاءِ يُسَاعِدُ فِي تَحْسِينِ الهَضْمِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje puno vode pomaže u poboljšanju probave.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking a lot of water helps in improving digestion.

sentences.arabic: التَّغْذِيَةُ الجَيِّدَةُ تَمْنَحُنَا الطَّاقَةَ اللازِمَةَ لِلْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Dobra ishrana nam daje energiju potrebnu za rad.
sentences.translationEn: Good nutrition gives us the energy needed for work.
